title: New hook traits for extended lifecycle events
purpose: Norn's 5 existing hook traits cover tool and LLM boundaries plus session events. Six additional lifecycle boundaries have no hook coverage: user prompt submission, agent stop, sub-agent lifecycle, session lifecycle, compaction, and tool failure. This brief adds the 6 new traits and registers them on HookRegistry so both programmatic and config-driven hooks can target all 11 event types.
task: Create crates/norn/src/integration/hooks/new_traits.rs with 6 new async hook traits: UserPromptHook, StopHook, SubagentHook, SessionLifecycleHook, CompactionHook, PostToolFailureHook. Extend the Hook enum with 6 new variants. Add per-category storage vectors and dispatch methods on HookRegistry. Update hooks/mod.rs to declare and re-export the new module. Update integration/mod.rs re-exports. Dispatch wiring into the agent loop is NH-007, not this brief.

requirements.title: UserPromptHook trait
requirements.spec: UserPromptHook SHALL have an async method on_user_prompt that receives the prompt text and session ID and returns HookOutcome (Proceed or Block). SHALL NOT return Modify.
acceptance: UserPromptHook trait defined with: async fn on_user_prompt(&self, prompt: &str, session_id: &str) -> HookOutcome
Trait is Send + Sync
Uses #[async_trait]
Test: implement a blocking UserPromptHook, verify Block { reason } returned

requirements.title: StopHook trait
requirements.spec: StopHook SHALL have an async method on_stop that receives the final text and returns HookOutcome (Proceed or Block). Block forces the agent loop to continue.
acceptance: StopHook trait defined with: async fn on_stop(&self, final_text: &str) -> HookOutcome
Trait is Send + Sync
Test: implement a StopHook that blocks when final_text is empty, verify Block returned

requirements.title: SubagentHook trait
requirements.spec: SubagentHook SHALL have two async methods: on_subagent_start (observational, no return) and on_subagent_stop (returns HookOutcome). Both receive the agent ID and agent type as string slices.
acceptance: on_subagent_start(&self, agent_id: &str, agent_type: &str) — no return value
on_subagent_stop(&self, agent_id: &str, agent_type: &str) -> HookOutcome
Trait is Send + Sync
Test: implement SubagentHook, verify start is observational, stop can block

requirements.title: SessionLifecycleHook trait
requirements.spec: SessionLifecycleHook SHALL have two async methods: on_session_start and on_session_end. Both are observational (no return value). Both receive the session ID.
acceptance: on_session_start(&self, session_id: &str) — no return value
on_session_end(&self, session_id: &str) — no return value
Trait is Send + Sync
Test: implement SessionLifecycleHook with a counter, verify both methods fire

requirements.title: CompactionHook trait
requirements.spec: CompactionHook SHALL have an async method before_compaction that receives the event count and returns HookOutcome (Proceed or Block). Block prevents the compaction.
acceptance: before_compaction(&self, event_count: usize) -> HookOutcome
Trait is Send + Sync
Test: implement CompactionHook that blocks when event_count < 10, verify Block returned

requirements.title: PostToolFailureHook trait
requirements.spec: PostToolFailureHook SHALL have an async method after_tool_failure that receives the ToolEnvelope and ToolOutput. Observational only — no return value.
acceptance: after_tool_failure(&self, envelope: &ToolEnvelope, output: &ToolOutput, ctx: &ToolContext) — no return value
Trait is Send + Sync
Test: implement PostToolFailureHook with a counter, verify it fires on error output

requirements.title: Hook enum and HookRegistry extension
requirements.spec: The Hook enum SHALL gain 6 new variants: UserPrompt, Stop, Subagent, SessionLifecycle, Compaction, PostToolFailure. HookRegistry SHALL store each in a per-category Vec and provide dispatch methods matching the existing pattern (sequential, pre-hooks short-circuit on Block).
acceptance: Hook enum has 11 variants total (5 existing + 6 new)
HookRegistry has 6 new private Vec fields: user_prompt, stop, subagent, session_lifecycle, compaction, post_tool_failure
register() matches on all 11 variants and pushes to the correct Vec
6 new dispatch methods: run_user_prompt, run_stop, run_subagent_start, run_subagent_stop, run_session_start, run_session_end, run_pre_compaction, run_post_tool_failure
Pre-hooks (user_prompt, stop, subagent_stop, pre_compaction) short-circuit on first Block
Observational hooks (subagent_start, session_start, session_end, post_tool_failure) fire all in order
Per-category _len() methods added for all new categories
Test: register one of each new type, verify counts and dispatch

boundaries: SHALL NOT wire dispatch points into the agent loop — that is NH-007
SHALL NOT implement ShellCommandHook or config-driven registration — those are NH-005 and NH-006
SHALL NOT modify existing hook trait signatures
SHALL NOT add todo!() or unimplemented!() macros anywhere
verification: All existing hook tests in traits.rs pass unchanged
No file exceeds 500 lines of code (excluding tests, comments, whitespace)
